SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CBSI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHEELER, JAMES J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,110.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
